nasb.text: Every one of you shall reverence his mother and his father, and you shall keep My sabbaths; I am the Lord your God.

esv.text: Every one of you shall revere his mother and his father, and you shall keep my Sabbaths: I am the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 各人要孝敬父母，也要謹守我的安息日；我是耶和華你們的　神。

ccb.text: 你们每个人都必须孝敬父母，遵守我的安息日。我是你们的上帝耶和华。
